prose: **Acrolein Fukui reactivity** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact two-electron integrals), PySCF via chemkit; gas phase; charge 0; multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on the supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz` (unrelaxed at DFT level). SCF converged; no warnings reported. Mulliken-based condensed Fukui indices (f\u207a for electrophilicity, f\u207b for nucleophilicity) were computed on the neutral, N-1 (doublet), and N+1 (doublet) states. The most electrophilic site is C atom 4 (1-based labeling) with f\u207a = 0.64232102. Files: result JSON at `acrolein_fukui_dft.json`. CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpt8uvaglh/live.json`.
